params.hash: The hash of the document to retrieve

getDocumentSignature(bytes32).details: Get the signature for a specific document

isDocumentStored(bytes32).details: Check if a document hash exists in storage

returns.exists: Boolean indicating if the document exists

storeDocumentHash(bytes32,uint256,bytes).details: Store a document hash with timestamp and signature

params.hash: The keccak256 hash of the document content
params.signature: Cryptographic signature of the hash by the signer
params.timestamp: Unix timestamp when the document was created

returns.success: Boolean indicating if the operation was successful

params.hash: The keccak256 hash of the document content

returns.isValid: Boolean indicating if the document is valid
